OmicsKit 1.0.0.0000
  • Reference

    GDC TCGA Lung Adenocarcinoma (LUAD) - Metadata

    sampledata.Rd

    Samples information of the subset of TCGA-LUAD RNA-seq gene-level counts generated by STAR and distributed via UCSC Xena. Data originate from GDC, only selected samples are included. Sample barcodes were compacted and written with dots instead of dashes (e.g., "TCGA-38-4627-11A" → "TCGA.38.4627.11A").

    sampledata

    Format

    sampledata

    A data frame with 32 rows and 12 columns:

    patient_id

    TCGA sample ID written with dots instead of dashes, e.g., TCGA.38.4627.11A.

    sample_type

    Sample category, e.g., "tumor" or "normal".

    age

    Age (years) at diagnosis/collection.

    race_demographic

    Self-reported race/ethnicity (e.g., "white").

    sex

    Biological sex ("male" / "female").

    status

    Vital status at last follow-up ("Alive" / "Dead").

    pathologic_stage

    Overall AJCC pathologic stage, e.g., "Stage IA", "Stage IIIA".

    pathologic_t

    Primary tumor (T) category, e.g., "T1b", "T2".

    smoking_status

    Smoking history from TCGA clinical (free text), e.g., "Lifelong Non-smoker".

    agents

    Therapeutic agents administered (free text; may be empty).

    treatment_response

    Clinical response to therapy (free text; may be empty).

    treatment_type

    Type of therapy (free text; may be empty).

    Source

    https://gdc-hub.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/download/TCGA-LUAD.star_counts.tsv.gz

    Contents

    Developed by Daniel Guevara, Daniel Garbozo, Angela Alarcon, Jennifer Almeyda, David Requena.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
